jobs.title: Electrical Engineer – Standards Compliance Expert for Dry Transformers 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity Join our team to drive the implementation of the latest internal and external standards in our Dry Transformers across all the factories in HUB Europe. This role offers you an exciting opportunity to broaden your expertise across various disciplines and functions, engage in dynamic projects and build a strong professional network both within and outside our organization. How you'll make an impact Be an active member of International Standards Committees, staying up to date with emerging changes and requirements and influencing standards development Support Product Management in developing and implementing our Global Technology Platform by engaging in requirements definition and supporting the rollout phases Work with teams from various functions, including Engineering, Operations and Quality. You will establish and maintain both internal and external networks to facilitate information exchange Oversee operations across multiple factories and work towards operational harmonization Ensure the effective implementation of both internal and external standards within our Power Transformers Units in Europe by conducting audits, identifying gaps and facilitating their resolution Responsible for communicating updates, deliver training sessions and provide support and technical guidance to colleagues on Standards Compliance related questions Represent our Company in standards-related discussions with customers and industry stakeholders Your background Master's degree in Engineering (Electrical or Mechanical are preferred) About 10 to 15 years of experience in the Power Transformer field Experience in Project Management and managing functional teams Deep knowledge of transformers design, manufacturing, testing and operations Interest in AI tools and their potential integration into one's work L6S green belt is preferred Excellent intercultural sensitivity and ability to develop and maintain healthy working relationships Strong communication skills, fluent in English, both written and spoken More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

descriptionByLocale.it:
## Descrizione
Unisciti al nostro team per guidare l'implementazione degli ultimi standard interni ed esterni nei nostri Dry Transformers in tutte le fabbriche di HUB Europe. Questo ruolo vi offre un'opportunità emozionante per ampliare le vostre competenze in diverse discipline e funzioni, impegnarsi in progetti dinamici e costruire una forte rete professionale sia all'interno che all'esterno della nostra organizzazione.

## Mansioni
Come farai ad avere un impatto
- Essere un membro attivo dei comitati internazionali di standard, rimanendo aggiornati con cambiamenti e requisiti emergenti e influenzare lo sviluppo degli standard
- Supporta la gestione dei prodotti nello sviluppo e nell'attuazione della nostra piattaforma tecnologica globale, impegnando la definizione dei requisiti e supportando le fasi di rollout
- Lavorare con team di varie funzioni, tra cui Ingegneria, Operazioni e Qualità.
- Stabilire e mantenere sia le reti interne che esterne per facilitare lo scambio di informazioni
- supervisionare le operazioni in più fabbriche e lavorare verso l'armonizzazione operativa
- Assicurare l'effettiva implementazione di standard interni ed esterni all'interno delle nostre unità di trasformatori di potenza in Europa conducendo audit, identificando lacune e facilitando la loro risoluzione
- Responsabile per la comunicazione di aggiornamenti, fornire sessioni di formazione e fornire supporto e assistenza tecnica ai colleghi su domande di conformità standard
- Rappresentare la nostra azienda nelle discussioni relative agli standard con i clienti e le parti interessate del settore

# Requisiti #
Il tuo sfondo
- Laurea magistrale in Ingegneria (Elettrica o Meccanica sono preferiti)
- Circa 10-15 anni di esperienza nel campo Power Transformer
- Esperienza in Project Management e gestione di team funzionali
- profonda conoscenza della progettazione, produzione, test e operazioni dei trasformatori
- Interessi negli strumenti AI e la loro potenziale integrazione nel proprio lavoro
- La cintura verde L6S è preferita
- Eccellente sensibilità interculturale e capacità di sviluppare e mantenere rapporti di lavoro sani
- Forte capacità di comunicazione, fluente in inglese, scritto e parlato

#
- Le nostre pratiche di lavoro flessibili ti aiutano a ottimizzare le prestazioni personali e aziendali creando un ambiente in cui tutti i dipendenti possono sviluppare le loro competenze e crescere.
descriptionByLocale.en:
## Descrizione
The opportunity Join our team to drive the implementation of the latest internal and external standards in our Dry Transformers across all the factories in HUB Europe. This role offers you an exciting opportunity to broaden your expertise across various disciplines and functions, engage in dynamic projects and build a strong professional network both within and outside our organization.

## Mansioni
How you'll make an impact
- Be an active member of International Standards Committees, staying up to date with emerging changes and requirements and influencing standards development
- Support Product Management in developing and implementing our Global Technology Platform by engaging in requirements definition and supporting the rollout phases
- Work with teams from various functions, including Engineering, Operations and Quality.
- You will establish and maintain both internal and external networks to facilitate information exchange
- Oversee operations across multiple factories and work towards operational harmonization
- Ensure the effective implementation of both internal and external standards within our Power Transformers Units in Europe by conducting audits, identifying gaps and facilitating their resolution
- Responsible for communicating updates, deliver training sessions and provide support and technical guidance to colleagues on Standards Compliance related questions
- Represent our Company in standards-related discussions with customers and industry stakeholders

## Requisiti
Your background
- Master's degree in Engineering (Electrical or Mechanical are preferred)
- About 10 to 15 years of experience in the Power Transformer field
- Experience in Project Management and managing functional teams
- Deep knowledge of transformers design, manufacturing, testing and operations
- Interest in AI tools and their potential integration into one's work
- L6S green belt is preferred
- Excellent intercultural sensitivity and ability to develop and maintain healthy working relationships
- Strong communication skills, fluent in English, both written and spoken

## About us
- Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

How you'll make an impact Be an active member of International Standards Committees, staying up to date with emerging changes and requirements and influencing standards development Support Product Management in developing and implementing our Global Technology Platform by engaging in requirements definition and supporting the rollout phases Work with teams from various functions, including Engineering, Operations and Quality. You will establish and maintain both internal and external networks to facilitate information exchange Oversee operations across multiple factories and work towards operational harmonization Ensure the effective implementation of both internal and external standards within our Power Transformers Units in Europe by conducting audits, identifying gaps and facilitating their resolution Responsible for communicating updates, deliver training sessions and provide support and technical guidance to colleagues on Standards Compliance related questions Represent our Company in standards-related discussions with customers and industry stakeholders Your background Master's degree in Engineering (Electrical or Mechanical are preferred) About 10 to 15 years of experience in the Power Transformer field Experience in Project Management and managing functional teams Deep knowledge of transformers design, manufacturing, testing and operations Interest in AI tools and their potential integration into one's work L6S green belt is preferred Excellent intercultural sensitivity and ability to develop and maintain healthy working relationships Strong communication skills, fluent in English, both written and spoken More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.
descriptionByLocale.fr:
Descrizione
L'opportunité Rejoignez notre équipe pour conduire la mise en œuvre des dernières normes internes et externes dans nos transformateurs à sec dans toutes les usines de HUB Europe. Ce rôle vous offre une occasion passionnante d'élargir votre expertise dans diverses disciplines et fonctions, de participer à des projets dynamiques et de bâtir un solide réseau professionnel au sein et à l'extérieur de notre organisation.

Les hommes
Comment vous ferez un impact
- Être un membre actif des Comités internationaux de normalisation, se tenir au courant des nouveaux changements et des nouvelles exigences et influer sur l'élaboration des normes
- Soutenir la gestion des produits dans le développement et la mise en œuvre de notre plateforme technologique mondiale en prenant part à la définition des exigences et en soutenant les phases de déploiement
- Travailler avec des équipes de diverses fonctions, dont l'ingénierie, les opérations et la qualité.
- Vous établirez et entretenirez des réseaux internes et externes pour faciliter l'échange d'informations
- Superviser les opérations dans plusieurs usines et œuvrer à l'harmonisation opérationnelle
- Assurer la mise en œuvre effective des normes internes et externes au sein de nos unités de transformateurs de puissance en Europe en procédant à des audits, en identifiant les lacunes et en facilitant leur résolution
- Responsable de la communication des mises à jour, de la prestation de séances de formation et du soutien et des conseils techniques aux collègues sur les questions liées à la conformité aux normes
- Représenter notre société dans les discussions sur les normes avec les clients et les intervenants de l'industrie

## Requisiti
Vos antécédents
- Maîtrise en Ingénierie (Electrique ou Mécanique sont préférés)
- Environ 10 à 15 ans d'expérience dans le domaine du transformateur de puissance
- Expérience en gestion de projet et gestion d'équipes fonctionnelles
- Connaissance approfondie de la conception, de la fabrication, des essais et des opérations des transformateurs
- Intérêt pour les outils d'IA et leur intégration potentielle dans son travail
- La ceinture verte L6S est préférée
- Excellente sensibilité interculturelle et capacité à développer et maintenir des relations de travail saines
- Fortes compétences en communication, en anglais, écrit et parlé

À propos de nous
- Nos pratiques de travail flexibles vous aident à optimiser la performance personnelle et professionnelle tout en créant un environnement où tous les employés peuvent développer leurs compétences et grandir.

jobs.title: R&D electrical engineer
jobs.description: The Opporutnity As new R&D Electrical Engineer, you will join our Global Multi-Physic Simulation (GLOMUS) network team in the Technology Center of HITACHI Energy. You will be part of a group of key people with specific expertise in the fields of electrical, structural, acoustic, thermo-mechanic and fluid-dynamics analyses, simulation and testing. As part of our global R&D community including Technology Centers and Research Centers worldwide, you will contribute to support all factories in the PG Dry, Traction and Distribution Transformers on innovative and challenging research projects. You will focus on developing new technologies and products, optimizing existing ones and on supporting different engineering offices around the world. How you will make an impact Study of current state of art in the field of 2D and 3D simulation of transformers Analysis of performance of different parameters of dry transformers by means of 2D and 3D electromagnetic FEM calculations Develop new automations for the assessment of products through electromagnetic simulations coupled with structural, thermomechanical and acoustic simulations Run feasibility studies, develop new technical concepts, design new products and simulate their expected performances Organize prototyping and testing activities to validate new technologies\/products Lead product and technology development projects in the field of Dry, Traction and Oil Distribution Transformer, delivering results on time and on budget at agreed scope and quality Support the transfer of technology and knowledge from R&D to engineering department by writing design rules, preparing trainings and collaborating with design tools team Provide technical support to other departments when needed (engineering, product management, marketing and sales etc.) Living Hitachi Energy's core values of safety and integrity, which means taking responsibility for your own actions while caring for your colleagues and the business. Your background MSc + 1 years of experience in Electrical Engineering field PhD in Electrical Engineering is preferred Existing work experience in Electrical Engineering with particular focus on transformer design Background experience on acoustics of transformers. Advanced knowledge of transformer design and prediction of relevant performance such as leakage fields, stray losses, no-load losses, short-circuit forces, mutual inductances, and similar Experience in the finite element analysis (ANSYS, COMSOL, FEM electromagnetic simulation tool) Knowledge of at least one of the following programming languages ( Python, Matlab, C#) Experience in electric testing of transformers Project management skills Action and result oriented mindset Innovation spirit, "out of the box" thinking More about us We pride ourselves on offering a holistic range of competitive benefit programs to support your financial, physical and mental wellbeing and personal development. We want you to truly thrive with us – in work and out. Our employee benefit programs are tailored to each country, depending on location of employment and job grade. During the recruitment process you will be given more specific information on the employee benefit program offering in your intended country of employment.

titleByLocale.it: Ingegnere elettrico di ricerca e sviluppo

descriptionByLocale.it: L'opportunità In qualità di nuovo ingegnere elettrico di ricerca e sviluppo, entrerai a far parte del nostro team di rete Global Multi-Physic Simulation (GLOMUS) nel Centro tecnologico di HITACHI Energy. Farai parte di un gruppo di persone chiave con competenze specifiche nei campi delle analisi, simulazioni e test elettrici, strutturali, acustici, termomeccanici e fluidodinamici. Come parte della nostra comunità globale di ricerca e sviluppo, che comprende centri tecnologici e centri di ricerca in tutto il mondo, contribuirai a supportare tutte le fabbriche dei trasformatori a secco, di trazione e di distribuzione PG su progetti di ricerca innovativi e stimolanti. Ti concentrerai sullo sviluppo di nuove tecnologie e prodotti, sull'ottimizzazione di quelli esistenti e sul supporto di diversi uffici di ingegneria in tutto il mondo. Come avrai un impatto Studio dello stato dell'arte attuale nel campo della simulazione 2D e 3D dei trasformatori Analisi delle prestazioni di diversi parametri di trasformatori a secco mediante calcoli FEM elettromagnetici 2D e 3D Sviluppare nuove automazioni per la valutazione dei prodotti attraverso simulazioni elettromagnetiche abbinate a simulazioni strutturali, termomeccaniche e acustiche Eseguire studi di fattibilità, sviluppare nuovi concetti tecnici, progettare nuovi prodotti e simulare le prestazioni attese Organizzare attività di prototipazione e test per validare nuove tecnologie\/prodotti Prodotto principale e progetti di sviluppo tecnologico nel campo dei trasformatori a secco, di trazione e di distribuzione dell'olio, fornendo risultati nei tempi e nel rispetto del budget, nell'ambito e nella qualità concordati. Supportare il trasferimento di tecnologia e conoscenze dal dipartimento di ricerca e sviluppo al dipartimento di ingegneria scrivendo regole di progettazione, preparando corsi di formazione e collaborando con il team degli strumenti di progettazione. Fornire supporto tecnico ad altri dipartimenti quando necessario (ingegneria, gestione del prodotto, marketing e vendite, ecc.). Vivere i valori fondamentali di sicurezza e integrità di Hitachi Energy, il che significa assumersi la responsabilità delle proprie azioni prendendosi cura dei propri colleghi e dell'azienda. Il tuo background Master + 1 anno di esperienza nel campo dell'ingegneria elettrica È preferibile il dottorato di ricerca in ingegneria elettrica Esperienza lavorativa esistente in ingegneria elettrica con particolare attenzione alla progettazione di trasformatori Esperienza di base sull'acustica dei trasformatori. Conoscenza avanzata della progettazione dei trasformatori e previsione delle prestazioni rilevanti quali campi di dispersione, perdite parassite, perdite a vuoto, forze di cortocircuito, induttanze reciproche e simili Esperienza nell'analisi degli elementi finiti (ANSYS, COMSOL, strumento di simulazione elettromagnetica FEM) Conoscenza di almeno uno dei seguenti linguaggi di programmazione (Python, Matlab, C#) Esperienza nei test elettrici dei trasformatori Capacità di gestione del progetto Mentalità orientata all'azione e ai risultati Spirito di innovazione, pensiero "fuori dagli schemi" Maggiori informazioni su di noi Siamo orgogliosi di offrire una gamma olistica di programmi di vantaggi competitivi per sostenere il vostro benessere finanziario, fisico e mentale e lo sviluppo personale. Vogliamo che tu possa davvero prosperare con noi, nel lavoro e fuori. I nostri programmi di benefit per i dipendenti sono personalizzati per ciascun Paese, a seconda della sede di lavoro e del livello lavorativo. Durante il processo di reclutamento ti verranno fornite informazioni più specifiche sul programma di benefici per i dipendenti offerto nel paese in cui intendi lavorare.
descriptionByLocale.en: The Opporutnity As new R&D Electrical Engineer, you will join our Global Multi-Physic Simulation (GLOMUS) network team in the Technology Center of HITACHI Energy. You will be part of a group of key people with specific expertise in the fields of electrical, structural, acoustic, thermo-mechanic and fluid-dynamics analyses, simulation and testing. As part of our global R&D community including Technology Centers and Research Centers worldwide, you will contribute to support all factories in the PG Dry, Traction and Distribution Transformers on innovative and challenging research projects. You will focus on developing new technologies and products, optimizing existing ones and on supporting different engineering offices around the world. How you will make an impact Study of current state of art in the field of 2D and 3D simulation of transformers Analysis of performance of different parameters of dry transformers by means of 2D and 3D electromagnetic FEM calculations Develop new automations for the assessment of products through electromagnetic simulations coupled with structural, thermomechanical and acoustic simulations Run feasibility studies, develop new technical concepts, design new products and simulate their expected performances Organize prototyping and testing activities to validate new technologies\/products Lead product and technology development projects in the field of Dry, Traction and Oil Distribution Transformer, delivering results on time and on budget at agreed scope and quality Support the transfer of technology and knowledge from R&D to engineering department by writing design rules, preparing trainings and collaborating with design tools team Provide technical support to other departments when needed (engineering, product management, marketing and sales etc.) Living Hitachi Energy's core values of safety and integrity, which means taking responsibility for your own actions while caring for your colleagues and the business. Your background MSc + 1 years of experience in Electrical Engineering field PhD in Electrical Engineering is preferred Existing work experience in Electrical Engineering with particular focus on transformer design Background experience on acoustics of transformers. Advanced knowledge of transformer design and prediction of relevant performance such as leakage fields, stray losses, no-load losses, short-circuit forces, mutual inductances, and similar Experience in the finite element analysis (ANSYS, COMSOL, FEM electromagnetic simulation tool) Knowledge of at least one of the following programming languages ( Python, Matlab, C#) Experience in electric testing of transformers Project management skills Action and result oriented mindset Innovation spirit, "out of the box" thinking More about us We pride ourselves on offering a holistic range of competitive benefit programs to support your financial, physical and mental wellbeing and personal development. We want you to truly thrive with us – in work and out. Our employee benefit programs are tailored to each country, depending on location of employment and job grade. During the recruitment process you will be given more specific information on the employee benefit program offering in your intended country of employment.
descriptionByLocale.de: Die Chance: Als neuer F&E-Elektroingenieur werden Sie Teil unseres Global Multi-Physic Simulation (GLOMUS)-Netzwerkteams im Technologiezentrum von HITACHI Energy. Sie werden Teil einer Gruppe von Schlüsselpersonen mit spezifischem Fachwissen in den Bereichen elektrische, strukturelle, akustische, thermomechanische und strömungsdynamische Analysen, Simulation und Tests sein. Als Teil unserer globalen Forschungs- und Entwicklungsgemeinschaft, zu der Technologiezentren und Forschungszentren weltweit gehören, tragen Sie dazu bei, alle Fabriken der PG-Trocken-, Traktions- und Verteilungstransformatoren bei innovativen und herausfordernden Forschungsprojekten zu unterstützen. Ihr Schwerpunkt liegt auf der Entwicklung neuer Technologien und Produkte, der Optimierung bestehender Technologien und der Unterstützung verschiedener Ingenieurbüros auf der ganzen Welt. Wie Sie etwas bewirken werden: Studium des aktuellen Stands der Technik auf dem Gebiet der 2D- und 3D-Simulation von Transformatoren. Analyse der Leistung verschiedener Parameter von Trockentransformatoren mittels elektromagnetischer 2D- und 3D-FEM-Berechnungen Technologieentwicklungsprojekte im Bereich Trocken-, Traktions- und Ölverteilungstransformatoren, die Ergebnisse pünktlich und im Rahmen des vereinbarten Umfangs und der vereinbarten Qualität liefern. Unterstützen Sie den Technologie- und Wissenstransfer von der Forschungs- und Entwicklungsabteilung zur Konstruktionsabteilung, indem Sie Konstruktionsregeln schreiben, Schulungen vorbereiten und mit dem Design-Tools-Team zusammenarbeiten. Bieten Sie bei Bedarf technischen Support für andere Abteilungen (Technik, Produktmanagement, Marketing und Vertrieb usw.). Sie leben die Grundwerte von Hitachi Energy, Sicherheit und Integrität, was bedeutet, Verantwortung für Ihr eigenes Handeln zu übernehmen und sich gleichzeitig um Ihre Kollegen und das Unternehmen zu kümmern. Ihr Hintergrund MSc + 1 Jahr Erfahrung im Bereich Elektrotechnik Ein Doktortitel in Elektrotechnik wird bevorzugt. Vorhandene Berufserfahrung in Elektrotechnik mit besonderem Schwerpunkt auf Transformatordesign. Hintergrunderfahrung in der Akustik von Transformatoren. Fortgeschrittene Kenntnisse im Transformatordesign und Vorhersage relevanter Leistungen wie Leckfelder, Streuverluste, Leerlaufverluste, Kurzschlusskräfte, gegenseitige Induktivitäten und Ähnliches. Erfahrung in der Finite-Elemente-Analyse (ANSYS, COMSOL, FEM elektromagnetisches Simulationstool). Kenntnisse in mindestens einer der folgenden Programmiersprachen (Python, Matlab, C#). Erfahrung im elektrischen Testen von Transformatoren. Projektmanagementfähigkeiten. Aktions- und ergebnisorientierte Denkweise. Innovationsgeist, „Out-of-the-Box“-Denken. Mehr über uns. Wir sind stolz darauf, ein ganzheitliches Angebot an wettbewerbsfähigen Produkten anzubieten Vorteilsprogramme zur Unterstützung Ihres finanziellen, körperlichen und geistigen Wohlbefindens und Ihrer persönlichen Entwicklung. Wir möchten, dass Sie bei uns wirklich erfolgreich sind – beruflich und privat. Unsere Mitarbeitervorteilsprogramme sind auf jedes Land zugeschnitten, abhängig vom Beschäftigungsort und der Beschäftigungsstufe. Während des Rekrutierungsprozesses erhalten Sie genauere Informationen über das Angebot an Mitarbeitervorteilen in dem Land, in dem Sie arbeiten möchten.
descriptionByLocale.fr: L'opportunité En tant que nouvel ingénieur électricien R&D, vous rejoindrez notre équipe du réseau Global Multi-Physic Simulation (GLOMUS) au sein du centre technologique d'HITACHI Energy. Vous ferez partie d'un groupe de personnes clés possédant une expertise spécifique dans les domaines des analyses, simulations et essais électriques, structurels, acoustiques, thermomécaniques et dynamiques des fluides. En tant que membre de notre communauté mondiale de R&D, comprenant des centres technologiques et des centres de recherche dans le monde entier, vous contribuerez à soutenir toutes les usines des transformateurs secs, de traction et de distribution PG sur des projets de recherche innovants et stimulants. Vous vous concentrerez sur le développement de nouvelles technologies et de nouveaux produits, sur l'optimisation de ceux existants et sur le support de différents bureaux d'ingénierie à travers le monde. Comment vous aurez un impact Étude de l'état actuel de l'art dans le domaine de la simulation 2D et 3D des transformateurs Analyse des performances de différents paramètres des transformateurs secs au moyen de calculs FEM électromagnétiques 2D et 3D Développer de nouveaux automatismes pour l'évaluation des produits à travers des simulations électromagnétiques couplées à des simulations structurelles, thermomécaniques et acoustiques Réaliser des études de faisabilité, développer de nouveaux concepts techniques, concevoir de nouveaux produits et simuler leurs performances attendues Organiser des activités de prototypage et de tests pour valider les nouvelles technologies/produits Diriger le produit et la technologie projets de développement dans le domaine des transformateurs secs, de traction et de distribution d'huile, fournissant des résultats dans les délais et dans les limites du budget, selon la portée et la qualité convenues. Soutenir le transfert de technologie et de connaissances de la R&D au département d'ingénierie en rédigeant des règles de conception, en préparant des formations et en collaborant avec l'équipe des outils de conception. Fournir un soutien technique aux autres départements en cas de besoin (ingénierie, gestion de produits, marketing et ventes, etc.). Vivre les valeurs fondamentales de sécurité et d'intégrité d'Hitachi Energy, ce qui signifie assumer la responsabilité de vos propres actions tout en prenant soin de vos collègues et de l'entreprise. Votre formation MSc + 1 ans d'expérience dans le domaine du génie électrique. Un doctorat en génie électrique est préférable. Expérience professionnelle existante en génie électrique, avec un accent particulier sur la conception de transformateurs. Expérience de base en acoustique des transformateurs. Connaissance avancée de la conception de transformateurs et prédiction des performances pertinentes telles que les champs de fuite, les pertes parasites, les pertes à vide, les forces de court-circuit, les inductances mutuelles et similaires Expérience dans l'analyse par éléments finis (ANSYS, COMSOL, outil de simulation électromagnétique FEM) Connaissance d'au moins un des langages de programmation suivants (Python, Matlab, C#) Expérience dans les tests électriques de transformateurs Compétences en gestion de projet Esprit d'action et orienté résultat Esprit d'innovation, pensée « out of the box » En savoir plus sur nous Nous sommes fiers d'offrir une gamme holistique de programmes d’avantages sociaux compétitifs pour soutenir votre bien-être financier, physique et mental et votre développement personnel. Nous voulons que vous vous épanouissiez vraiment avec nous – au travail comme à l’extérieur. Nos programmes d’avantages sociaux sont adaptés à chaque pays, en fonction du lieu d’emploi et du grade du poste. Au cours du processus de recrutement, vous recevrez des informations plus spécifiques sur le programme d'avantages sociaux proposé dans votre pays d'emploi prévu.

jobs.title: Electrical Design Engineer - Dry Transformers 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity Joining our Dry Transformer engineering team, you'll help shape next generation designs that improve safety, efficiency, and sustainability in critical power applications. You'll collaborate closely with R&D, production, quality, and supply chain to translate customer requirements into manufacturable solutions and see them through prototype, type testing, and serial release. Working across global projects and standards, you'll deepen your expertise in insulation systems, electromagnetic design, and thermal performance while contributing to the digitalization of our design processes. This is a high impact role where your work directly enables reliable electricity for industries and communities worldwide. How you'll make an impact Lead the development of design specifications and models, ensuring they meet all relevant standards and regulations Conduct thorough design reviews and verifications, implementing modifications to elevate project quality Monitor and manage project timelines, ensuring design milestones are achieved and projects are delivered on schedule Conduct risk assessments, develop mitigation strategies, and seek opportunities for design innovations Engage with customers to capture and incorporate their feedback into design solutions, enhancing customer satisfaction Collaborate with the supply chain team to ensure designs are manufacturable and cost-effective, selecting optimal materials and components Prepare and maintain detailed documentation that supports design processes and facilitates knowledge sharing Identify and implement continuous design improvements based on test results and industry best practices, enhancing quality and efficiency Your background Degree in electrical engineering or a related field 2-5 years of experience in electrical design engineering of dry type transformers Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills Ability to work both independently and as part of a multidisciplinary team English is a must, Italian is beneficial Pro-active attitude, self-motivated and with a strong sense of ownership Open to change, feedback and continuous improvement. More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

descriptionByLocale.it: L'opportunità Unirti al nostro team di ingegneria dei trasformatori a secco, aiuterai a creare progetti di nuova generazione che migliorano la sicurezza, l'efficienza e la sostenibilità nelle applicazioni critiche di potenza. Collaborerai strettamente con R&D, produzione, qualità e catena di approvvigionamento per tradurre le esigenze dei clienti in soluzioni produttibili e vederle attraverso la prototipazione, il test di tipo e la rilascio in serie. Lavorando su progetti globali e standard, approfondirai la tua conoscenza dei sistemi di isolamento, del disegno elettromagnetico e del rendimento termico mentre contribuirai alla digitalizzazione dei nostri processi di progettazione. Questo è un ruolo di grande impatto dove il tuo lavoro consente direttamente l'elettricità affidabile per le industrie e le comunità in tutto il mondo. Come farai un impatto Guida lo sviluppo delle specifiche e dei modelli di progettazione, assicurandoti che rispettino tutte le norme e le regolamentazioni rilevanti Conduci revisioni e verifiche di progettazione approfondite, implementando modifiche per elevare la qualità del progetto Monitora e gestisci i tempi di progetto, assicurandoti che i milestone di progettazione siano raggiunti e i progetti siano consegnati in tempo Conduci valutazioni di rischio, sviluppa strategie di mitigazione e cerca opportunità per innovazioni di progettazione Interagisci con i clienti per catturare e incorporare le loro osservazioni nelle soluzioni di progettazione, migliorando la soddisfazione dei clienti Collabora con l'equipe di catena di approvvigionamento per assicurarti che le progettazioni siano produttibili e a costo ottimale, selezionando materiali e componenti ottimali Prepara e mantiene documentazione dettagliata che supporta i processi di progettazione e facilita la condivisione delle conoscenze Identifica e implementa miglioramenti continui della progettazione basati sui risultati dei test e le migliori prassi dell'industria, migliorando la qualità e l'efficienza Il tuo background Laurea in ingegneria elettrica o campo correlato 2-5 anni di esperienza in ingegneria di progettazione elettrica di trasformatori a secco Eccellenti abilità analitiche e di risoluzione dei problemi Capacità di lavorare sia in modo autonomo che come parte di un team multidisciplinare L'inglese è obbligatorio, l'italiano è utile Atteggiamento proattivo, motivato e con un forte senso di proprietà Aperto al cambiamento, alle osservazioni e all'auto-improvement continuo. Di più su di noi Le nostre pratiche di lavoro flessibili ti aiutano a ottimizzare il tuo rendimento personale e professionale mentre creiamo un ambiente in cui tutti gli impiegati possano sviluppare le loro abilità e crescere.
descriptionByLocale.en: The opportunity Joining our Dry Transformer engineering team, you'll help shape next generation designs that improve safety, efficiency, and sustainability in critical power applications. You'll collaborate closely with R&D, production, quality, and supply chain to translate customer requirements into manufacturable solutions and see them through prototype, type testing, and serial release. Working across global projects and standards, you'll deepen your expertise in insulation systems, electromagnetic design, and thermal performance while contributing to the digitalization of our design processes. This is a high impact role where your work directly enables reliable electricity for industries and communities worldwide. How you'll make an impact Lead the development of design specifications and models, ensuring they meet all relevant standards and regulations Conduct thorough design reviews and verifications, implementing modifications to elevate project quality Monitor and manage project timelines, ensuring design milestones are achieved and projects are delivered on schedule Conduct risk assessments, develop mitigation strategies, and seek opportunities for design innovations Engage with customers to capture and incorporate their feedback into design solutions, enhancing customer satisfaction Collaborate with the supply chain team to ensure designs are manufacturable and cost-effective, selecting optimal materials and components Prepare and maintain detailed documentation that supports design processes and facilitates knowledge sharing Identify and implement continuous design improvements based on test results and industry best practices, enhancing quality and efficiency Your background Degree in electrical engineering or a related field 2-5 years of experience in electrical design engineering of dry type transformers Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills Ability to work both independently and as part of a multidisciplinary team English is a must, Italian is beneficial Pro-active attitude, self-motivated and with a strong sense of ownership Open to change, feedback and continuous improvement. More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.
descriptionByLocale.de: Die Chance Bist du bereit, Teil unseres Teams für Trockentransformatoren zu werden? Du wirst dabei helfen, die nächste Generation von Entwürfen zu schaffen, die die Sicherheit, Effizienz und Nachhaltigkeit in kritischen Stromanwendungen verbessern. Du wirst eng mit R&D, Produktion, Qualitätsmanagement und Lieferkette zusammenarbeiten, um Kundenanforderungen in herstellbare Lösungen umzusetzen und sie durch Prototypen, Typentests und Serienauslieferung zu begleiten. Bei der Arbeit an globalen Projekten und Standards wirst du deine Kenntnisse in Isolationsystemen, elektromagnetischen Entwürfen und thermischer Leistung vertiefen und zum digitalen Wandel unserer Entwurfsprozesse beitragen. Dies ist ein hochrangiger Job, bei dem dein Werk direkt zuverlässigen Strom für Industrie und Gemeinschaften weltweit ermöglicht. Wie wirst du einen Unterschied machen Leite die Entwicklung von Entwurfspezifikationen und -modellen, die alle relevanten Normen und Vorschriften erfüllen Durchführe gründliche Entwurfsprüfungen und -verifikationen, um Änderungen vorzunehmen, um die Projektqualität zu verbessern Überwache und gestalte Projekttermine, um sicherzustellen, dass Entwurfsmeilensteine erreicht werden und Projekte pünktlich abgeschlossen werden Durchführe Risikobewertungen, entwickle Strategien zur Risikominderung und suche nach Möglichkeiten für Entwurfsinnovationen Interagiere mit Kunden, um ihre Rückmeldungen in Entwurfslösungen zu integrieren und die Kundenzufriedenheit zu verbessern Arbeite mit der Lieferkette zusammen, um sicherzustellen, dass Entwürfe herstellbar und kosteneffizient sind, indem du optimale Materialien und Komponenten auswählst Vorbereite und halte detaillierte Dokumentation bereit, die Entwurfsprozesse unterstützt und Wissen teilt Identifiziere und implementiere kontinuierliche Entwurfsverbesserungen auf der Grundlage von Testergebnissen und Branchenbesten Praktiken, um Qualität und Effizienz zu verbessern Dein Hintergrund Diplom in Elektrotechnik oder einem verwandten Fach 2-5 Jahre Erfahrung in der Elektrotechnik-Entwicklung von Trockentransformatoren Ausgezeichnete analytische und Problemlösungsfähigkeiten Fähigkeit, sowohl unabhängig als auch als Teil eines multidisziplinären Teams zu arbeiten Englisch ist obligatorisch, Deutsch ist wünschenswert Proaktives Verhalten, motiviert und mit einem starken Sinn für Eigentum Offen für Veränderungen, Rückmeldungen und kontinuierliche Verbesserung. Mehr über uns Unsere flexible Arbeitspraktiken helfen dir, deine persönliche und berufliche Leistung zu optimieren, während wir ein Umfeld schaffen, in dem alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.
descriptionByLocale.fr: L'opportunité Rejoins notre équipe d'ingénierie de transformateurs sèches et aide à créer des projets de nouvelle génération qui améliorent la sécurité, l'efficacité et la durabilité dans les applications critiques de l'énergie. Tu collaboreras étroitement avec R&D, production, qualité et chaîne d'approvisionnement pour traduire les besoins des clients en solutions réalisables et les accompagner à travers la prototypage, les tests de type et la mise en série. En travaillant sur des projets mondiaux et des normes, tu approfondiras tes connaissances en systèmes d'isolement, en conception électromagnétique et en performance thermique tout en contribuant à la numérisation de nos processus de conception. C'est un rôle d'impact important où ton travail permet directement l'électricité fiable pour les industries et les communautés à l'échelle mondiale. Comment tu feras une différence Dirige le développement de spécifications et de modèles de conception, en veillant à ce qu'ils répondent à toutes les normes et réglementations pertinentes Conduis des examens et des vérifications de conception approfondis, en mettant en œuvre des modifications pour améliorer la qualité du projet Surveille et gère les délais de projet, en veillant à ce que les jalons de conception soient atteints et que les projets soient livrés à temps Conduis des évaluations de risque, développe des stratégies de réduction des risques et cherche des opportunités pour des innovations de conception Interagis avec les clients pour capturer et intégrer leurs commentaires dans les solutions de conception, améliorant la satisfaction des clients Collabore avec l'équipe de chaîne d'approvisionnement pour veiller à ce que les conceptions soient réalisables et rentables, en sélectionnant des matériaux et des composants optimaux Prépare et maintiens une documentation détaillée qui soutient les processus de conception et facilite la partage des connaissances Identifie et met en œuvre des améliorations continues de la conception sur la base des résultats des tests et des meilleures pratiques de l'industrie, améliorant la qualité et l'efficacité Ton arrière-plan Diplôme en électrotechnique ou un domaine connexe 2-5 ans d'expérience en ingénierie de conception électrotechnique de transformateurs sèches Excellentes compétences analytiques et de résolution de problèmes Capacité à travailler de manière autonome et en tant que membre d'une équipe multidisciplinaire Français est obligatoire, allemand est utile Attitude proactive, motivée et avec un fort sens de propriété Ouverte à la modification, aux commentaires et à l'amélioration continue. En savoir plus sur nous Nos pratiques de travail flexibles t'aideront à optimiser ta performance personnelle et professionnelle tout en créant un environnement où tous les employés peuvent développer leurs compétences et grandir.

jobs.title: Environmental and Employee Health & Safety Specialist 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
jobs.description: The opportunity As a Factory Environmental and Employee Health & Safety Specialist part of the local HSE team, you will play a key role in participating to HSE development, with main focus on Environmental topic, but granting a good support on Health & Safety activities. Key tasks on the Environmental side will be related to safeguarding our site's environmental integrity and driving our sustainability ambitions forward. In this role, you will ensure full compliance with all relevant environmental laws, regulations, and permits, while fostering strong relationships with community stakeholders and environmental authorities. You will develop, implement, and maintain robust environmental policies and procedures that promote accountability across the organization. By conducting environmental risk assessments, delivering training on sustainability practices, and leading initiatives that improve resource efficiency, you will directly contribute to reducing the factory's environmental footprint and supporting long-term operational excellence. On the H&S part, you'll be required to support main Health and Safety development activities organized by the HSE Manager, delivering results according to Management expectations. Please submit your application in English. How you'll make an impact Ensure regulatory compliance with Swiss environmental law and related frameworks (USG\/EPA, LRV\/OAPC, GSchG\/WPA, VVEA, ChemA\/ChemO), including permit management and coordination with cantonal authorities (BAFU) Lead environmental impact assessments for new production lines, plant changes, and modifications, ensuring alignment with internal environmental policies Manage waste and disposals, including segregation, traceability, registers, supplier audits, and all special waste streams, while supporting wastereduction and VVEA improvement initiatives Oversee chemical compliance, including ChemA, ChemO, ORRChem, CLP, Manage and maintain Safety SDS requirements, and notifications of new substances Support safe handling and storage of dangerous goods (DG) by coordinating with relevant departments and ensuring ongoing compliance Plan and conduct environmental audits and inspections, identifying improvement areas and ensuring timely corrective actions, also providing environmental compliance support and training to Engineering, Maintenance, and overall Business Unit, including REACH\/RoHS documentation and sustainability-related data needs On the Health and Safety part, you're required to support HSE manager in H&S-related topics managing production activities and equipment with the highest safety standards, both on the practical part and on documentation preparation. Support HSE reporting activities required by governmental or Hitachi Energy internal stakeholders. Your background Min. 3 years of experience in environmental roles within the industrial sector and strong knowledge of Swiss environmental regulations and compliance obligations Solid understanding of best practices in emissions, waste, water, chemicals, and sustainability Strong analytical skills, including environmental data processing and use of relevant software tools Basic knowledge of H&S principles and concepts Excellent command of Office 365 applications Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to assess environmental risks and develop effective mitigation strategies Excellent verbal and written communication skills for engaging with diverse internal and external stakeholders Fluent in Italian and English More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.

titleByLocale.it: Specialista in Salute e Sicurezza Ambientale e dei Lavoratori 80 – 100% (m/f/d)
titleByLocale.en: Environmental and Employee Health & Safety Specialist 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
titleByLocale.de: Environmental and Employee Health & Safety Spezialist 80 – 100% (f/m/d)
titleByLocale.fr: Spécialiste en Santé et Sécurité Environnementale et des Travailleurs 80 – 100% (m/f/d)

descriptionByLocale.it: L'opportunità Come Specialista in Salute e Sicurezza Ambientale e dei Lavoratori parte del team HSE locale, parteciperai allo sviluppo dell'HSE, con focus principale sugli aspetti ambientali, ma garantendo un buon supporto alle attività di Salute e Sicurezza. I compiti chiave sul fronte ambientale saranno legati alla salvaguardia dell'integrità ambientale del nostro sito e alla promozione delle nostre ambizioni di sostenibilità. In questo ruolo, assicurerai la piena conformità con tutte le leggi, i regolamenti e le autorizzazioni ambientali pertinenti, favorendo al contempo solide relazioni con gli stakeholder della comunità e le autorità ambientali. Svilupperai, implementerai e manterrai politiche e procedure ambientali solide che promuovono la responsabilità in tutta l'organizzazione. Conducendo valutazioni dei rischi ambientali, fornendo formazione sulle pratiche di sostenibilità e guidando iniziative che migliorano l'efficienza delle risorse, contribuirai direttamente a ridurre l'impatto ambientale dello stabilimento e a supportare l'eccellenza operativa a lungo termine. Per quanto riguarda la Salute e la Sicurezza, sarai tenuto a supportare le principali attività di sviluppo della Salute e della Sicurezza organizzate dal Responsabile HSE, consegnando risultati secondo le aspettative della Direzione. Come avrai un impatto Assicurare la conformità normativa con la legge ambientale svizzera e relativi quadri (USG/EPA, LRV/OAPC, GSchG/WPA, VVEA, ChemA/ChemO), compresa la gestione delle autorizzazioni e la coordinazione con le autorità cantonali (BAFU) Condurre valutazioni dell'impatto ambientale per nuove linee di produzione, modifiche e modifiche dello stabilimento, assicurando l'allineamento con le politiche ambientali interne Gestire i rifiuti e le disposizioni, compresa la segregazione, la tracciabilità, i registri, gli audit dei fornitori e tutti i flussi di rifiuti speciali, supportando le iniziative di riduzione dei rifiuti e di miglioramento della VVEA Sovrintendere alla conformità chimica, compresa ChemA, ChemO, ORRChem, CLP, gestire e mantenere i requisiti di sicurezza SDS e notifiche di nuove sostanze Supportare la manipolazione e lo stoccaggio sicuri di merci pericolose (DG) coordinando con i reparti pertinenti e assicurando la conformità continua Pianificare e condurre audit e ispezioni ambientali, identificando aree di miglioramento e assicurando azioni correttive tempestive, fornendo inoltre supporto alla conformità ambientale e formazione a Ingegneria, Manutenzione e all'intera Unità Commerciale, compresa la documentazione REACH/RoHS e le esigenze di dati relativi alla sostenibilità Per quanto riguarda la Salute e la Sicurezza, sarai tenuto a supportare il responsabile HSE in argomenti relativi alla Salute e alla Sicurezza, gestendo le attività di produzione e le attrezzature con i più alti standard di sicurezza, sia nella parte pratica che nella preparazione della documentazione. Supportare le attività di reporting HSE richieste dagli stakeholder governativi o interni di Hitachi Energy. Il tuo background Min. 3 anni di esperienza in ruoli ambientali all'interno del settore industriale e una forte conoscenza delle normative ambientali svizzere e degli obblighi di conformità Solida comprensione delle migliori pratiche in materia di emissioni, rifiuti, acqua, sostanze chimiche e sostenibilità Solide competenze analitiche, compresa la lavorazione dei dati ambientali e l'uso di strumenti software pertinenti Conoscenza di base dei principi e concetti di Salute e Sicurezza Eccellente conoscenza delle applicazioni Office 365 Solide competenze di problem-solving con la capacità di valutare i rischi ambientali e sviluppare strategie di mitigazione efficaci Eccellenti competenze verbali e scritte per interagire con diversi stakeholder interni ed esterni Fluentemente in italiano e inglese Ulteriori informazioni Le nostre pratiche di lavoro flessibili aiutano a ottimizzare le prestazioni personali e commerciali, creando un ambiente in cui tutti i dipendenti possono sviluppare le proprie competenze e crescere.
descriptionByLocale.en: The opportunity As a Factory Environmental and Employee Health & Safety Specialist part of the local HSE team, you will play a key role in participating to HSE development, with main focus on Environmental topic, but granting a good support on Health & Safety activities. Key tasks on the Environmental side will be related to safeguarding our site's environmental integrity and driving our sustainability ambitions forward. In this role, you will ensure full compliance with all relevant environmental laws, regulations, and permits, while fostering strong relationships with community stakeholders and environmental authorities. You will develop, implement, and maintain robust environmental policies and procedures that promote accountability across the organization. By conducting environmental risk assessments, delivering training on sustainability practices, and leading initiatives that improve resource efficiency, you will directly contribute to reducing the factory's environmental footprint and supporting long-term operational excellence. On the H&S part, you'll be required to support main Health and Safety development activities organized by the HSE Manager, delivering results according to Management expectations. Please submit your application in English. How you'll make an impact Ensure regulatory compliance with Swiss environmental law and related frameworks (USG\/EPA, LRV\/OAPC, GSchG\/WPA, VVEA, ChemA\/ChemO), including permit management and coordination with cantonal authorities (BAFU) Lead environmental impact assessments for new production lines, plant changes, and modifications, ensuring alignment with internal environmental policies Manage waste and disposals, including segregation, traceability, registers, supplier audits, and all special waste streams, while supporting wastereduction and VVEA improvement initiatives Oversee chemical compliance, including ChemA, ChemO, ORRChem, CLP, Manage and maintain Safety SDS requirements, and notifications of new substances Support safe handling and storage of dangerous goods (DG) by coordinating with relevant departments and ensuring ongoing compliance Plan and conduct environmental audits and inspections, identifying improvement areas and ensuring timely corrective actions, also providing environmental compliance support and training to Engineering, Maintenance, and overall Business Unit, including REACH\/RoHS documentation and sustainability-related data needs On the Health and Safety part, you're required to support HSE manager in H&S-related topics managing production activities and equipment with the highest safety standards, both on the practical part and on documentation preparation. Support HSE reporting activities required by governmental or Hitachi Energy internal stakeholders. Your background Min. 3 years of experience in environmental roles within the industrial sector and strong knowledge of Swiss environmental regulations and compliance obligations Solid understanding of best practices in emissions, waste, water, chemicals, and sustainability Strong analytical skills, including environmental data processing and use of relevant software tools Basic knowledge of H&S principles and concepts Excellent command of Office 365 applications Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to assess environmental risks and develop effective mitigation strategies Excellent verbal and written communication skills for engaging with diverse internal and external stakeholders Fluent in Italian and English More about us Our flexible working practices help you optimize personal and business performance while creating an environment where all employees can develop their skills and grow.
descriptionByLocale.de: Die Gelegenheit Als Umwelt- und Arbeitssicherheits-Spezialist im lokalen HSE-Team werden Sie eine Schlüsselrolle bei der Entwicklung von HSE spielen, mit Schwerpunkt auf Umweltaspekten, aber auch mit guter Unterstützung bei Gesundheits- und Sicherheitsaktivitäten. Die Hauptaufgaben im Umweltbereich werden mit der Sicherung der Umweltintegrität unseres Standorts und der Förderung unserer Nachhaltigkeitsambitionen zusammenhängen. In dieser Rolle werden Sie die volle Einhaltung aller relevanten Umweltgesetze, -vorschriften und -genehmigungen sicherstellen, während Sie gleichzeitig enge Beziehungen zu den Stakeholdern der Gemeinschaft und den Umweltbehörden aufbauen. Sie werden umweltpolitische und -verfahrensmäßige Rahmenbedingungen entwickeln, umsetzen und aufrechterhalten, die die Verantwortung im gesamten Unternehmen fördern. Durch die Durchführung von Umwelt-Risikobewertungen, die Lieferung von Schulungen zu Nachhaltigkeitspraktiken und die Leitung von Initiativen, die die Ressourceneffizienz verbessern, werden Sie direkt dazu beitragen, den Umweltfußabdruck des Werks zu verringern und die langfristige operative Exzellenz zu unterstützen. Im Bereich Gesundheit und Sicherheit müssen Sie die wichtigsten Entwicklungsaktivitäten für Gesundheit und Sicherheit unterstützen, die vom HSE-Manager organisiert werden, und Ergebnisse gemäß den Erwartungen des Managements liefern. Wie Sie einen Unterschied machen werden Sicherstellung der Einhaltung der Schweizer Umweltgesetzgebung und relevanter Rahmenbedingungen (USG/EPA, LRV/OAPC, GSchG/WPA, VVEA, ChemA/ChemO), einschließlich Genehmigung und Koordination mit kantonalen Behörden (BAFU) Durchführung von Umweltverträglichkeitsprüfungen für neue Produktionslinien, Änderungen und Modifikationen des Werks, Sicherstellung der Übereinstimmung mit internen Umweltpolitiken Abfall- und Entsorgungsmanagement, einschließlich Segregation, Rückverfolgbarkeit, Register, Lieferantenaudits und aller speziellen Abfallströme, während Unterstützung von Abfallreduzierungs- und VVEA-Verbesserungsinitiativen Überwachung der chemischen Einhaltung, einschließlich ChemA, ChemO, ORRChem, CLP, Verwaltung und Instandhaltung von Sicherheitsdatenblättern (SDB) und Notifikationen neuer Stoffe Sichere Handhabung und Lagerung von Gefahrgut (DG) durch Koordination mit relevanten Abteilungen und Sicherstellung der kontinuierlichen Einhaltung Umwelt-Audits und -Inspektionen planen und durchführen, Verbesserungspotenziale identifizieren und zeitnahe Korrekturmaßnahmen sicherstellen, außerdem Umwelt-Compliance-Unterstützung und -Schulung für Ingenieurwesen, Instandhaltung und gesamte Geschäfts Einheit, einschließlich REACH/RoHS-Dokumentation und Nachhaltigkeitsdaten-Anforderungen Im Bereich Gesundheit und Sicherheit müssen Sie den HSE-Manager bei gesundheits- und sicherheitsrelevanten Themen unterstützen, Produktionsaktivitäten und -ausrüstung mit den höchsten Sicherheitsstandards verwalten, sowohl in der praktischen als auch in der dokumentarischen Vorbereitung. Unterstützung von HSE-Berichterstattungsaktivitäten, die von Regierungs- oder internen Stakeholdern von Hitachi Energy erforderlich sind. Ihr Hintergrund Mind. 3 Jahre Erfahrung in Umweltrollen innerhalb des Industriesektors und fundierte Kenntnisse der Schweizer Umweltgesetzgebung und -Compliance-Verpflichtungen Solides Verständnis von Best-Practice-Ansätzen bei Emissionen, Abfall, Wasser, Chemikalien und Nachhaltigkeit Starke analytische Fähigkeiten, einschließlich Umwelt-Datenverarbeitung und Verwendung relevanter Software-Tools Grundkenntnisse von Gesundheits- und Sicherheitsgrundsätzen und -konzepten Exzellente Kenntnisse von Office-365-Anwendungen Starke Problemlösungsfähigkeiten mit der Fähigkeit, Umwelt-Risiken zu bewerten und effektive Minderungsstrategien zu entwickeln Exzellente verbale und schriftliche Kommunikationsfähigkeiten für die Zusammenarbeit mit diversen internen und externen Stakeholdern Fließend in Deutsch und Englisch Mehr über uns Unsere flexiblen Arbeitsmodelle helfen Ihnen, persönliche und geschäftliche Leistungen zu optimieren und ein Umfeld zu schaffen, in dem alle Mitarbeiter ihre Fähigkeiten entwickeln und wachsen können.
descriptionByLocale.fr: L'opportunité En tant que Spécialiste en Santé et Sécurité Environnementale et des Travailleurs au sein de l'équipe HSE locale, vous jouerez un rôle clé dans le développement de l'HSE, avec un focus principal sur les aspects environnementaux, mais en garantissant un bon soutien aux activités de Santé et Sécurité. Les tâches clés du côté environnemental seront liées à la sauvegarde de l'intégrité environnementale de notre site et à la promotion de nos ambitions de durabilité. Dans ce rôle, vous assurerez la pleine conformité avec toutes les lois, réglementations et permis environnementaux pertinents, tout en favorisant des relations solides avec les parties prenantes de la communauté et les autorités environnementales. Vous développerez, mettrez en œuvre et maintiendrez des politiques et des procédures environnementales solides qui promeuvent la responsabilité dans l'ensemble de l'organisation. En menant des évaluations des risques environnementaux, en fournissant une formation sur les pratiques de durabilité et en dirigeant des initiatives qui améliorent l'efficacité des ressources, vous contribuerez directement à réduire l'empreinte environnementale de l'usine et à soutenir l'excellence opérationnelle à long terme. Pour ce qui est de la Santé et de la Sécurité, vous serez tenu de soutenir les principales activités de développement de la Santé et de la Sécurité organisées par le Responsable HSE, et de fournir des résultats conformément aux attentes de la Direction. Comment vous ferez une différence Assurer la conformité réglementaire avec la loi environnementale suisse et les cadres pertinents (USG/EPA, LRV/OAPC, GSchG/WPA, VVEA, ChemA/ChemO), y compris la gestion des permis et la coordination avec les autorités cantonales (BAFU) Mener des évaluations de l'impact environnemental pour les nouvelles lignes de production, les changements et les modifications de l'usine, en assurant l'alignement avec les politiques environnementales internes Gérer les déchets et les éliminations, y compris la ségrégation, la traçabilité, les registres, les audits des fournisseurs et tous les flux de déchets spéciaux, tout en soutenant les initiatives de réduction des déchets et d'amélioration de la VVEA Superviser la conformité chimique, y compris ChemA, ChemO, ORRChem, CLP, gérer et maintenir les exigences de sécurité des FDS et les notifications de nouvelles substances Soutenir la manipulation et le stockage sûrs des marchandises dangereuses (DG) en coordonnant avec les départements pertinents et en assurant la conformité continue Planifier et mener des audits et des inspections environnementaux, identifier les domaines d'amélioration et assurer des actions correctives en temps opportun, fournir également un soutien à la conformité environnementale et une formation à l'Ingénierie, à la Maintenance et à l'ensemble de l'Unité commerciale, y compris la documentation REACH/RoHS et les besoins en données de durabilité Pour ce qui est de la Santé et de la Sécurité, vous serez tenu de soutenir le responsable HSE sur des sujets liés à la Santé et à la Sécurité, en gérant les activités de production et les équipements avec les normes de sécurité les plus élevées, tant sur le plan pratique que sur la préparation de la documentation. Soutenir les activités de reporting HSE exigées par les parties prenantes gouvernementales ou internes de Hitachi Energy. Votre background Min. 3 ans d'expérience dans des rôles environnementaux au sein du secteur industriel et une solide connaissance de la réglementation environnementale suisse et des obligations de conformité Solide compréhension des meilleures pratiques en matière d'émissions, de déchets, d'eau, de produits chimiques et de durabilité Solides compétences analytiques, y compris le traitement de données environnementales et l'utilisation d'outils logiciels pertinents Connaissance de base des principes et des concepts de Santé et de Sécurité Excellente maîtrise des applications Office 365 Solides compétences en résolution de problèmes avec la capacité d'évaluer les risques environnementaux et de développer des stratégies d'atténuation efficaces Excellentes compétences verbales et écrites pour interagir avec des parties prenantes internes et externes diversifiées Courant en italien et en anglais En savoir plus sur nous Nos pratiques de travail flexibles aident à optimiser les performances personnelles et commerciales, tout en créant un environnement où tous les employés peuvent développer leurs compétences et grandir.

jobs.title: Business Analyst Global Product Group DT
jobs.description: The Opportunity: As a part of Global Product Group Distribution & Traction Transformers team, you will be responsible for business analysis for core digitalization projects including Digital TrafoSignature, ECS, IBA and Matterport within 25 factories in the portfolio scope. You will contribute cross-functionally by collaborating with IT function and business domains, as well as being responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining the GPG DT Power BI reports to monitor KPIs and performance metrics How you'll make an impact Ensure adherence to data governance standards and maintain comprehensive documentation for all reports and processes within GPG DT Operations Digital area. Collect and design business requirements into required documentation format and templates. Identify opportunities to enhance reporting processes, tools, and methodologies for greater efficiency and scalability. Implement best practices and leverage emerging technologies to improve data analytics capabilities. Provide training and guidance to business teams on the analytics reports, core digital tools, TrafoSignature tool. Collaborate with global teams, HUBs, and factories to gather requirements and deliver tailored reporting solutions. Act as a key liaison between technical teams and business stakeholders to ensure alignment and transparency. Lead functional and business analysis for core projects: Digital TrafoSignature, ECS, IBA, Matterport from business perspective. Perform user acceptance tests and validation together with key-users and IT. Provide digital updates on GPG DT website content with the usage of CMS. Your background Degree in Engineering, Data Science, IT or a related technical field. Minimum 5 years of experience in end-to-end data analytics, preferably within manufacturing or industrial environments. Proficiency in Power BI, including advanced DAX functions, Power Query, and report scheduling. Good knowledge of data modeling, visualization, and integration from multiple sources (e.g., SAP, SQL, Azure, Power Automate). Excellent communication and collaboration skills to work with global technical teams and stakeholders. Strong understanding of functional and business analysis. Strong problem-solving abilities, attention to detail, and ability to work independently in a global team environment. We are committed to full transparency and compliance with all legal requirements, ensuring that every candidate knows exactly what to expect at each stage of the recruitment process. Once the process is successfully completed, we will share detailed information about financial conditions and benefits with the selected candidate. Before signing the employment contract, you will receive all remaining details of the offer, giving you the time and space to review everything carefully .* * A pplicable only for Poland location align with local law regulations

titleByLocale.it: Business Analista Global Product Group DT
titleByLocale.en: Business Analyst Global Product Group DT
titleByLocale.fr: Business Analyste Global Product Group DT

descriptionByLocale.it: Opportunità: Come parte del team Global Product Group Distribution & Traction Transformers, sarai responsabile dell'analisi aziendale per progetti di digitalizzazione core, tra cui Digital TrafoSignature, ECS, IBA e Matterport all'interno di 25 fabbriche nell'ambito del portafoglio. Contribuirai trasversalmente collaborando con funzioni IT e domini aziendali, oltre ad essere responsabile per la progettazione, lo sviluppo e il mantenimento dei rapporti GPG DT Power BI per monitorare i KPI e le metriche di performance Assicurare l'adesione agli standard di governance dei dati e mantenere una documentazione completa per tutti i rapporti e i processi all'interno dell'area GPG DT Operations Digital. Raccogliere e progettare i requisiti aziendali in formato e modelli di documentazione richiesti. Identificare le opportunità per migliorare i processi di reportistica, gli strumenti e le metodologie per una maggiore efficienza e scalabilità. Implementare le migliori pratiche e sfruttare le tecnologie emergenti per migliorare le capacità di analisi dei dati. Fornire formazione e guida ai team aziendali sui report di analisi, strumenti digitali core, strumento TrafoSignature. Collabora con team globali, HUB e fabbriche per raccogliere i requisiti e fornire soluzioni di report su misura. Agire come un collegamento chiave tra team tecnici e stakeholder aziendali per garantire allineamento e trasparenza. Analisi funzionale e aziendale per progetti di base: Digital TrafoSignature, ECS, IBA, Matterport dal punto di vista aziendale. Eseguire i test di accettazione dell'utente e la validazione insieme a utenti chiave e IT. Fornisci aggiornamenti digitali sul contenuto del sito GPG DT con l'utilizzo di CMS. La tua laurea in Ingegneria, Scienza dei dati, IT o un campo tecnico correlato. Minimo 5 anni di esperienza nell'analisi dei dati end-to-end, preferibilmente all'interno di ambienti produttivi o industriali. Proficienza in Power BI, comprese le funzioni DAX avanzate, Power Query e report scheduling. Buona conoscenza della modellazione, visualizzazione e integrazione dei dati da fonti multiple (ad esempio, SAP, SQL, Azure, Power Automate). Eccellente capacità di comunicazione e collaborazione per lavorare con team tecnici e stakeholder globali. Forte comprensione dell'analisi funzionale e aziendale. Forte capacità di problem solving, attenzione ai dettagli e capacità di lavorare in modo indipendente in un ambiente di team globale. Ci impegniamo a garantire la piena trasparenza e il rispetto di tutti i requisiti legali, assicurando che ogni candidato sappia esattamente cosa aspettarsi in ogni fase del processo di reclutamento. Una volta completato il processo, condivideremo informazioni dettagliate sulle condizioni finanziarie e sui benefici con il candidato selezionato. Prima di firmare il contratto di lavoro, riceverai tutti i dettagli rimanenti dell'offerta, dandoti il tempo e lo spazio per rivedere tutto con attenzione.* * Un pplicabile solo per la sede della Polonia allineare con i regolamenti di legge locali

descriptionByLocale.de: The Opportunity: Als Teil des Global Product Group Distribution & Traction Transformers Teams sind Sie in 25 Fabriken im Portfoliobereich für Kerndigitalisierungsprojekte wie Digital TrafoSignature, ECS, IBA und Matterport verantwortlich. Sie leisten einen funktionsübergreifenden Beitrag durch Zusammenarbeit mit IT-Funktion und Business-Domains sowie die Verantwortung für die Gestaltung, Entwicklung und Aufrechterhaltung der GPG DT Power BI-Berichte zur Überwachung von KPIs und Performance Metriken Wie Sie einen Einfluss auf die Einhaltung von Standards zur Datenverwaltung sicherstellen und umfassende Dokumentationen für alle Berichte und Prozesse im Bereich GPG DT Operations Digital aufrecht erhalten. Sammeln und gestalten Sie Geschäftsanforderungen in das erforderliche Dokumentationsformat und Vorlagen. Identifizieren Sie Möglichkeiten, um Reporting-Prozesse, Tools und Methoden für mehr Effizienz und Skalierbarkeit zu verbessern. Best Practices implementieren und neue Technologien nutzen, um die Fähigkeiten der Datenanalyse zu verbessern. Bieten Sie Schulungen und Beratung für Geschäftsteams zu den Analyseberichten, Kern-Digital-Tools, TrafoSignature-Tool. Zusammenarbeit mit globalen Teams, HUBs und Fabriken, um Anforderungen zu sammeln und maßgeschneiderte Reporting-Lösungen zu liefern. Aktivieren Sie als zentrale Verbindung zwischen technischen Teams und Geschäftspartnern, um die Ausrichtung und Transparenz zu gewährleisten. Führen Sie funktionale und geschäftliche Analyse für Kernprojekte: Digital TrafoSignature, ECS, IBA, Matterport aus geschäftlicher Sicht. Führen Sie die Akzeptanztests und Validierung zusammen mit Key-Usern und IT durch. Bieten Sie digitale Updates über die Inhalte der GPG DT-Website mit der Nutzung von CMS. Ihr Hintergrund Diplom in Engineering, Data Science, IT oder einem verwandten technischen Bereich. Mindestens 5 Jahre Erfahrung in End-to-End-Datenanalysen, vorzugsweise in Fertigungs- oder Industrieumgebungen. Vorteile in Power BI, einschließlich erweiterter DAX-Funktionen, Power Query und Berichtplanung. Gute Kenntnisse der Datenmodellierung, Visualisierung und Integration aus mehreren Quellen (z.B. SAP, SQL, Azure, Power Automate). Ausgezeichnete Kommunikations- und Kollaborationsfähigkeiten, um mit globalen technischen Teams und Stakeholdern zu arbeiten. Starkes Verständnis der funktionalen und geschäftlichen Analyse. Starke Problemlösungsfähigkeiten, Liebe zum Detail und Fähigkeit, selbständig in einer globalen Teamumgebung zu arbeiten. Wir sind verpflichtet, volle Transparenz und Einhaltung aller gesetzlichen Anforderungen zu gewährleisten, dass jeder Kandidat genau weiß, was in jeder Phase des Rekrutierungsprozesses zu erwarten ist. Sobald der Prozess erfolgreich abgeschlossen ist, werden wir detaillierte Informationen über die finanziellen Bedingungen und Vorteile mit dem ausgewählten Kandidaten teilen. Bevor Sie den Arbeitsvertrag unterzeichnen, erhalten Sie alle übrigen Details des Angebots und geben Ihnen Zeit und Raum, um alles sorgfältig zu überprüfen.* * Eine pplicable nur für Polen Standort vereinbar mit lokalen Gesetzen
descriptionByLocale.fr: The Opportunity: Dans le cadre de l'équipe Global Product Group Distribution & Traction Transformers, vous serez responsable de l'analyse d'affaires pour les projets de numérisation de base, y compris Digital TrafoSignature, ECS, IBA et Matterport dans 25 usines dans le domaine du portefeuille. Vous contribuerez de façon interfonctionnelle en collaborant avec les fonctions informatiques et les domaines d'activité, ainsi qu'en étant responsable de la conception, du développement et de la maintenance des rapports GPG DT Power BI pour surveiller les KPI et les mesures de performance Comment vous allez avoir un impact Assurer le respect des normes de gouvernance des données et tenir à jour une documentation complète pour tous les rapports et tous les processus au sein de GPG DT Operations Digital. Recueillir et concevoir les exigences opérationnelles dans le format et les modèles de documentation requis. Déterminer les possibilités d'améliorer les processus, les outils et les méthodes de présentation de rapports afin d'accroître l'efficience et l'évolutivité. Mettre en oeuvre des pratiques exemplaires et tirer parti des nouvelles technologies pour améliorer les capacités d'analyse des données. Fournir une formation et des conseils aux équipes d'affaires sur les rapports analytiques, les outils numériques de base, l'outil TrafoSignature. Collaborer avec des équipes mondiales, des HUB et des usines pour rassembler les exigences et fournir des solutions de rapport sur mesure. Agir en tant que liaison essentielle entre les équipes techniques et les parties prenantes pour assurer l'alignement et la transparence. Diriger l'analyse fonctionnelle et opérationnelle des projets de base : TrafoSignature numérique, ECS, IBA, Matterport du point de vue des entreprises. Effectuer des tests d'acceptation et de validation avec les utilisateurs clés et les TI. Fournir des mises à jour numériques sur le contenu du site Web de GPG DT avec l'utilisation de CMS. Votre formation Diplôme en ingénierie, sciences des données, TI ou un domaine technique connexe. Au moins 5 ans d'expérience dans l'analyse de données de bout en bout, de préférence dans des environnements industriels ou de fabrication. Compétence en puissance BI, y compris fonctions DAX avancées, requête de puissance, et calendrier des rapports. Bonne connaissance de la modélisation des données, de la visualisation et de l'intégration à partir de sources multiples (p. ex. SAP, SQL, Azure, Power Automate). Excellentes compétences en communication et collaboration pour travailler avec les équipes techniques mondiales et les parties prenantes. Une bonne compréhension de l'analyse fonctionnelle et opérationnelle. Fortes capacités de résolution de problèmes, attention aux détails et capacité de travailler de façon indépendante dans un environnement d'équipe global. Nous nous engageons à assurer la pleine transparence et le respect de toutes les exigences légales, en veillant à ce que chaque candidat sache exactement à quoi s'attendre à chaque étape du processus de recrutement. Une fois le processus mené à bien, nous communiquerons des renseignements détaillés sur les conditions et les avantages financiers au candidat sélectionné. Avant de signer le contrat de travail, vous recevrez tous les détails restants de l'offre, vous donnant le temps et l'espace pour examiner tout soigneusement .* * Un site accessible uniquement pour la Pologne s'harmonise avec la réglementation locale
